import io
import string
import list

fn parse_nums(line: String) -> List<Int>
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  nums
end

fn rebuild_used(used: List<Int>, target_idx: Int, size: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < size
    let v = match used.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if i == target_idx
      result = list.push(result, 1)
    else
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    "0"
  end

  let nums = parse_nums(line1)
  let n = nums.len()

  let k_raw = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  let k = if k_raw > n
    n
  else
    k_raw
  end

  mut used: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < n
    used = list.push(used, 0)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut step = 0
  while step < k
    mut best_idx = -1
    mut best_val = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let u = match used.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if u == 0
        let val = match nums.get(i)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        if best_idx == -1 or val > best_val
          best_idx = i
          best_val = val
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    result = list.push(result, best_val)
    used = rebuild_used(used, best_idx, n)
    step = step + 1
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut p = 0
  while p < k
    let v = match result.get(p)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if p == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
    p = p + 1
  end
  println(output)

  Ok(())
end
